password.desc: Set the server password. Leave blank for no password.

port.desc: What game port to bind the server to.

query_port.desc: Additional query port for server listing.

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/vrising && until [ -f /tmp/vrising/VRisingServer.exe ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 1829350 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 1829350 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /tmp/vrising +login anonymous +app_update 1829350 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/vrising/VRisingServer.exe ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/vrising/. . && rm -rf /tmp/vrising'

run.command: sh -c 'id -u vrising >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m vrising || adduser -D vrising; mkdir -p /home/vrising/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/vrising/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/vrising/.steam/sdk64/; fi; chown -R vrising:vrising . /home/vrising/.steam; exec runuser -u vrising -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/vrising/.wine" xvfb-run --auto-servernum --server-args="-screen 0 640x480x24:32" box64 wine ./VRisingServer.exe -persistentDataPath ./save-data -serverName "${name}" -saveName "${save_name}" -logFile "./logs/VRisingServer.log"'
